chunks.text: EECS Instructional Labs and AV Facilities EECS Instructional Labs and AV Facilities EECS supports UNIX, PC and electronics labs for use by students in EECS courses. These labs are in Cory and Soda Halls. Computing labs and servers are supported b

alls. Computing labs and servers are supported by the Instructional group (386 Cory, 333 Soda). Electronics labs and AV are supported by Electronics Support (377 Cory). Instructional Labs: Summary: equipment, capacity, staffing, services [ Summar
